nasb.text: The priest shall then command that they empty the house before the priest goes in to look at the mark, so that everything in the house need not become unclean; and afterward the priest shall go in to look at the house.

esv.text: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house before the priest goes to examine the disease, lest all that is in the house be declared unclean. And afterward the priest shall go in to see the house.

cnv.text: 祭司進去察看病症之前，要先吩咐人把房屋搬空，免得房屋裡的一切都成了不潔；然後祭司才進去，察看那房屋。

ccb.text: 祭司进去检查前，要吩咐人把房子腾空，免得房子里的一切都变得不洁净。之后，祭司要进去检查，
